title: ferray-ufunc: no keepdims= support on reduction operations
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's reductions support keepdims=True which preserves the reduced axis as a size-1 dimension. This is critical for broadcasting the result back against the original array shape (e.g., arr - arr.mean(axis=1, keepdims=True) for row-centering). ferray-ufunc's add_reduce drops the axis entirely. There's no way to keep it. Add a keepdims parameter to reduction operations.
